sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51140" key="i)so/puros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσό-πῡρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n51140.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">reckoned as of equal value with wheat</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λωτός, κρότων</foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">PLond.ined.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2360</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
